rvec center
 Centroid.
 

Detailed Description

Triangular surface element with cached geometry and utilities.

Stores node pointers and bordering domains, computes and caches:

  • reference unit normal (pointing to FRONT),
  • surface area and perimeter,
  • centroid (center of gravity),
  • analytic integrals I1, I2s, I2d.

Notes:

  • Node accessors return by value (Node) or pointer (NodePtr).
  • FBNormalVector() flips the reference normal for BACK.

Definition at line 32 of file Triangle.h.

Definition at line 199 of file Triangle.cpp.

◆ CalculateGeometryData()

int Triangle::CalculateGeometryData ( )

Compute/cached geometry (normal, area, perimeter, center, I1/I2s/I2d).

Returns
0 on success.

Recompute normal (FRONT), area, perimeter, centroid, and I1/I2s/I2d.

Normal and area: \( \mathbf{n} = (\mathbf{n_2}-\mathbf{n_1}) \times (\mathbf{n_3}-\mathbf{n_1}), A = |\mathbf{n}|/2, \hat{\mathbf{n}} = \mathbf{n}/|\mathbf{n}| \).

Perimeter and centroid: \( \mathbf{r_{cnt}} = (\mathbf{n_1}+\mathbf{n_2}+\mathbf{n_3})/3, \Pi = \sum_{i=1}^3 |\mathbf{e_i}|\) (sum of edge lengths).

Analytic integrals (I1,I2s,I2d) follow the project's closed forms.

Definition at line 62 of file Triangle.cpp.

◆ containsPoint()

bool Triangle::containsPoint ( const rvec & p,
double tol = 1e-6 )

Test whether a point lies on (or very near) the triangle.

The point is projected to the triangle plane and tested using barycentric/simplex coordinates with tolerance tol.

Parameters
pObservation point.
tolTolerance for coplanarity and barycentric tests.
Returns
true if p is on/near the facet; false otherwise.

Check if a point lies on/near the triangle (plane-project + barycentric).

Steps: 1) Reject if \( |(\mathbf{p} − \mathbf{n_0}) \cdot \mathbf{n}| > tol \) (off the plane). 2) Build an orthonormal basis {unitX, unitY} in the triangle plane. 3) Compute simplex (barycentric) coordinates (zeta) in 2D. 4) Accept if zeta_i >= −tol and sum(zeta) <= 1+tol.

Definition at line 322 of file Triangle.cpp.

◆ getI2Translated()

double Triangle::getI2Translated ( rvec r1,
rvec r2,
rvec t )

Return I2 for a translated configuration (periodic images).

Parameters
r1,r2Endpoints in original cell.
tTranslation vector for r1.
Returns
I2.

I2 for a translated configuration (periodic images).

If r1 translated by t coincides with r2, returns the single-vertex value I2s; otherwise returns the double-vertex value I2d associated with the remaining node.
